title: Intricate Floral Spanish Minari Pulpo A La Gallega
description: A vegetarian friendly Spanish dish featuring minari in a floral and fluffy pulpo a la gallega style, cooked to perfection in a bain marie.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Prepare a bain marie by filling a large baking dish with water to a depth of about 2 inches.
Combine the chopped minari, olive oil, garlic, paprika, smoked salt, and black pepper in a bowl and mix well.
Transfer the minari mixture to a heatproof dish and place it in the bain marie.
Pour in the lemon juice and chicken broth, making sure that the minari is completely covered with liquid.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the minari is tender.
Remove the dish from the oven and garnish with chopped fresh parsley and edible flowers.
Serve the minari hot, spooning some of the cooking liquid over the top of each serving.
